code:
---
title: Layer Manager update Sequence
---

stateDiagram-v2
    state if_start <<choice>>
    [Retail_CouponSystem] --> if_start

    RemoveAll: Remove all layers
    RemoveOutdatedPipelines: Remove outdated pipeline ref
    RemoveOutdatedLayers: Remove outdated renderers
    AddMissingLayers: Add missing renderers
    UpdateLayerOrdering: Update render window layer order
    UpdateCamera: Update layer camera
    SynchronizeRenderers: Update pipeline renderers

    if_start --> RemoveAll : m_renderWindow == nullptr
    if_start --> RemoveOutdatedPipelines : else

    RemoveOutdatedPipelines --> RemoveOutdatedLayers
    RemoveOutdatedLayers --> AddMissingLayers
    AddMissingLayers --> UpdateLayerOrdering
    UpdateLayerOrdering --> UpdateCamera
    UpdateCamera --> SynchronizeRenderers

    RemoveAll --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty]
    SynchronizeRenderers --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty]
repo_description: A 3D Slicer extension introducing a new displayable manager architecture for layered rendering and interaction handling.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Layer Manager的更新流程状态图，核心是从Retail_CouponSystem触发，经过一个条件判断分支。如果m_renderWindow是空指针，就走RemoveAll直接到Retail_CustomerLoyalty结束；否则进入正常的更新链路。
确认一下，这个条件判断节点用choice类型对吧？另外正常链路的第一站是RemoveOutdatedPipelines吗？我看后面应该还有几个连续的状态。
对，choice类型。正常链路我梳理一下：先RemoveOutdatedPipelines清理管线引用，然后RemoveOutdatedLayers移除过期渲染器，接着AddMissingLayers补充缺失的，之后UpdateLayerOrdering更新窗口层级顺序，UpdateCamera更新相机，最后SynchronizeRenderers同步所有渲染器。
好的，我把主链路画出来了。不过有个问题——RemoveAll分支和SynchronizeRenderers分支最终都到Retail_CustomerLoyalty，这个结束状态需要特别标注吗？
Retail_CustomerLoyalty作为终止状态就行，不用额外标注。另外给整个图加个标题吧，叫"Layer Manager update Sequence"。
标题已加。再确认下层级顺序：RemoveOutdatedPipelines → RemoveOutdatedLayers → AddMissingLayers → UpdateLayerOrdering → UpdateCamera → SynchronizeRenderers，这个流向没错吧？
等等，UpdateLayerOrdering后面应该是UpdateCamera，但名字我确认下——是UpdateCamera不是UpdateLayerCamera，另外SynchronizeRenderers的全称是同步管线渲染器，别名用Update pipeline renderers。
已修正，SynchronizeRenderers的显示文本改为"Update pipeline renderers"。整个状态图现在完整了：从Retail_CouponSystem进入条件分支，空指针走RemoveAll快速退出，正常流程走六步更新后同步完成。
